headlines.description: Savinho and Erling Haaland scored to give Manchester City a much-needed 2-0 victory at Leicester City on Sunday, the champions' first win in five Premier League games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland goal helps Man City snap winless run

headlines.description: Crystal Palace edged bottom-placed Southampton 2-1 at Selhurst Park on Sunday thanks to goals from Eberechi Eze and Trevoh Chalobah.
headlines.shortLinkText: Southampton woes continue with defeat to Palace

headlines.description: Goals from Chris Wood and Morgan Gibbs-White gave Nottingham Forest a 2-0 win over Everton on Sunday to move up to second in the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Superb Forest rise to second with win at Everton

headlines.description: Fulham were held to a 2-2 home draw by Bournemouth in their final Premier League game of the year after Dango Ouattara scored a late equaliser.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ouattara rescues point for Bournemouth at Fulham

headlines.description: Struggling Tottenham Hotspur had to settle for a 2-2 home draw against a revived Wolverhampton Wanderers side in an entertaining clash on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs' struggles continue with draw vs Wolves

headlines.description: Liverpool thrashed West Ham United to stretch their Premier League lead to eight points on Sunday with Mohamed Salah once again in irrepressible form.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah shines as Liverpool demolish West Ham
